violations.text: The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control and increase pest control as frequently as needed. Per PIC, pest control is coming every 2 weeks. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The walk-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Per PIC, RICFSM will be transferred to this location tomorrow. PIC is to send proof to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control and is to have a pest control report available for inspector at the time of the next inspection. Per PIC, next pest control visit is on 12/24/2025. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The walk-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control and is to have a pest control report available for inspector at the time of the next inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025
The walk-in freezer gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2025
The mop sink faucet was observed not connected to the mop sink. Establishment is to install faucet to mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025
The walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025

The floor in the service area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Plumbing under sanitizer bain at 3 bay sink was observed leaking into a container. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
Window sill by 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. Laminate covering was observed peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the storage area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

Ceiling by ware-washing area was observed with peeling paint and in poor repair. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and non absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the storage area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2023
The ceiling by ware washing area observed in poor repair, with peeling paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2023
The window sill above the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2023
The 3 bay sink is in poor repair, dripping into a container beneath the sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2023

Meatballs in marinara sauce was observed at 88 degrees Fahrenheit. Ready to eat foods taken from a commercially processed can or intact package from a food processing plant must be heated to at least 135 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was recently prepared and reheated to proper temperature during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water in cold bain between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2023

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
Plumbing under sanitizer bain at 3 bay sink was observed leaking into a container. Plumbing systems to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
Window sill by 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. Laminate covering was observed peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

The floor and wall junctures in the storage area were lacking coving and wall was observed in poor repair. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Area to be in good repair to maintain integrity of wall. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
Floor tiles by walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

Ceiling by warewashing area was observed with peeling paint and in poor repair. The materials for indoor ceilings must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

The walls by mop sink, 3 bay sink, and walk-in freezer have an accumulation of black residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
